check.action:
Single worktree. Invoke the worktree-setup skill once with: - ticket_slug = {{ticket_slug}} - primary_tag = {{primary_tag}} - plan_count = 1 (collapse multi-plan-sequential into one worktree per Lock 27 downstream effect) - parallel_safe = false - plan_index = (not used)
Capture returned: {{branch}}, {{worktree_path}}.

substep.title: Update Plan Frontmatter With Worktree Info
